name: Rusting Ammunition (Greater)
description:
Ammunition any

Activate 1 Interact

Rusting ammunition is made using a rust monster's saliva and, when activated, deals damage to objects or creatures primarily made of metal. The target takes ] damage for up to 6 rounds. A creature that drops to 0 Hit Points while taking this persistent damage crumbles into fine powder; its gear remains. For an object, the ammunition destroys a 10-foot cube.

Craft Requirements Supply the saliva of a
